author: dazzla76
text: init param is not supported in API versions < 1.25

author: dazzla76
text:
# Issue Type

* Bug report

# Molecule and Ansible details

```
ansible --version

```

```

Molecule installation method (one of):

* pip

Ansible installation method (one of):

* pip

# Platform

```
cat /etc/redhat-release

```

```

# Desired Behavior

Trying to run molecule --debug create should create a docker image as specified in role configuration

# Actual Behaviour (Bug report only)

We get the following ouput:
